title: astragalus hirtus
intro: Astragalus hirtus, also known as the hairy astragalus, is a perennial plant species native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hirtus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
